name: shots
description: Generate App Store screenshots, app icons, and localized listing copy from natural language through hosted Shots MCP tools.
longDescription: Generate App Store screenshots and app icons from natural language. Describe your screenshots in a prompt or import an App Store URL, then generate, revise, translate, and ship publish-ready assets for iPhone, iPad, Android, and Apple Watch. Includes ASO listing copy generation, 50+ locale localization, deep category research, and app icon moodboarding.
